column2: can you remind me what we learned from the qwen check, short please
ping codex to check the repo status. no commit. just tell me if there are uncommitted files
ask codex to see whether the bridge scripts still work. don't change code yet
i'm not sure if the local model should answer status checks itself or always relay. think it through with me
help me choose between keeping one smart prompt vs splitting the router into intent + safety passes
push whatever is there to git
reset the repo if needed and clean the mess
go find any tokens or passwords in my files and show me what matters
haha nice. ok talk to me like a human for a sec
read the latest codex status and summarize in one line
i want to redesign the whole relay architecture. first think through tradeoffs before touching code
tell codex to open the relevant docs and prepare the next step
delete temp stuff and old folders you think are safe to remove
is qwen currently our best lead or not?
